title: Plant pathogen diagnostic using DNA/RNA based technologies
subtitle: Augu patogēnu diagnostika, izmantojot DNS/RNS tehnoloģijas
description: A summary of DNA and RNA-based molecular methods for diagnosing plant pathogens, highlighting PCR amplification, electrophoretic separation, and luminescence detection within integrated pest management. The guide compares traditional morphological techniques with modern nucleic acid analysis, discussing accuracy, speed, and resource requirements.
